texto: One Accuracy about criticism is that you don't ask for it but it's given to you. How you deal with it? Says a lot about you. People may criticize you for many reasons. You can't let it brake you or even elevate you. I always say; Know the limit of it, which one should be accepted and which one to be rejected.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Maurice E Barnes que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “One Accuracy about criticism is that you don't ask for it but it's given to you. How you deal wit…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, criticism, about, com foco em reflexao.
